title: Vendor in latest containers/storage and containers/image
body:
Lots of fixes of deadlocks in storage.
Rename of the man pages for config files
Fixes for transports

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: Do you plan a new release soon?

The test failures here appear legitimate, and I don’t understand how the PR ended up this way.

Anyway, simple `make vendor` does not work either:
>(And IIRC that runs into OCI JSON schema validation breaking again.)

#553 revendors including a proposed fix for the OCI schema, and might work.

What about a new release?
A NixOS release is coming (end of september) and it would be nice to include a new Skopeo release since it fixes a bug on how we pull Docker images (basically, there are some k8s images that we could not pull).
If you finally don't plan to release soon, I could manually include relevant patches in our current Skopeo build. So, just let me know:)
